subject: DevOps
title: Hybrid Cloud Architecture
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Hybrid Cloud Architecture.

hook.text: The hospital must keep patient data local by law, but wants cloud AI. Hybrid bridges both.

buildup.text: Hybrid cloud links on-prem with public cloud. Sensitive data stays local. Elastic work goes up.

discovery.text: AWS Outposts, Azure Stack, and Anthos bring cloud APIs into your data center. Same tools, local.

twist.text: Hybrid adds latency between on-prem and cloud. Cache locally and sync asynchronously.

climax.text: Cloud bursting runs baseline on-prem. When demand spikes, extra capacity launches in the cloud.

punchline.text: Keep what must stay. Extend what needs to grow. Hybrid fits.

quiz.question: What is cloud bursting?
options: Running baseline workloads on-premises and using cloud for overflow during demand spikes
Moving all workloads to the cloud permanently
A cloud outage that causes data loss
